name: Chialin Precision Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Chialin Precision Industrial Co., Ltd. designs, processes, manufactures, and sells stamping dies and other related parts, precision terminals, and hardware parts in Taiwan. The company's products include bandolier pins, mobile and computer connectors, lamp and piranha lead frames, SMD lead frames, and antennas, as well as other products, such as EMI spring finger and shielding case. It is also involved in the development and leasing of houses and buildings. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
